evals.name: register-domain-and-mailboxes
evals.prompt: I just bought solar1.com on Dynadot for $8.99. Register it in the lead tracking DB and add 3 Winnr mailboxes (jay, madison, bob). Show the SQL.

expectations.text: INSERT INTO domains with domain, registrar, purchase_date, purchase_price, status fields
INSERT INTO mailboxes with domain_id subquery, email_address, provider, display_name
Standard names: Jay Feldman, Madison Popoff, Bob Porter
Domain_id uses subquery SELECT id FROM domains WHERE domain = ...

evals.name: health-check-queries
evals.prompt: Run health checks on my cold email infrastructure. Show me domains missing DNS, mailboxes not warming, and campaigns with high bounce rates.

expectations.text: Queries domains WHERE spf_configured=0 OR dkim_configured=0 OR dmarc_configured=0
Queries mailboxes WHERE status=warming AND warmup_enabled=0
Uses JOIN between mailboxes and domains tables
Uses latest synced_at subquery for campaign analytics

evals.name: classify-reply-and-update-lead
evals.prompt: Reply ID 42 is from a lead who wants a demo call. Classify it as interested and update the lead's pipeline status.

expectations.text: UPDATE replies SET classification = 'interested' WHERE id = 42
UPDATE leads SET interest_status = 'interested' using subquery from replies
Inserts a lead_events audit trail entry

evals.name: list-tables-and-scripts
evals.prompt: What tables are in the lead tracking DB and what scripts are available for managing it?

expectations.text: Lists all 13 tables: scrape_jobs, leads, email_verifications, campaign_assignments, lead_analytics, campaign_analytics, domains, mailboxes, copy_variants, sent_emails, replies, ab_test_results, lead_events
Lists scripts: import-leads.sh, email-guesser.sh, sync-analytics.sh, lead-report.sh
Mentions db-query.sh as the connection helper providing db_exec, db_query, etc.
